# Schedule I Game Types Reference

Generated: 2025-12-27 22:25:22
Total Types in Assembly: 3462
ScheduleOne Types: 2908
Namespaces: 130

## Usage in MelonLoader Mods

The namespaces are already prefixed with `Il2Cpp` in the generated assemblies.
Use them directly as shown in the import statements below.
